summary: Frontend-only ad placement testing for EveryFileConvert. All 10 placement requirements verified at 1440px desktop and 390px mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: hydration warning in console (className mismatch on body/html due to font class injection). Not ad-related, low priority.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ad placement fully verified. Layout at /en uses 3-col grid (layout.tsx). AdSlot renders dev placeholders (bg-slate-50, ADVERTISEMENT label). All data-testid attributes confirmed present and correct.
